seo.title: Characom Group — Building Cyprus since 1987
seo.description: Cypriot construction and development group. Government infrastructure, real estate development and residential communities — built to outlast us, since 1987.

props.headline: We build what outlasts us.
props.subheadline: Government infrastructure, real estate and residential craft — delivered across Cyprus by one accountable team.

image.alt: Construction site at dusk with tower cranes over Cyprus

props.heading: Four decades of building Cyprus
props.body:
Characom Group began in 1987 as a two-crew contractor pouring foundations on the edge of Nicosia. Four decades later, the same discipline runs through everything we deliver — from motorway interchanges to seafront homes.

We keep development, engineering and construction under one roof. It is a slower way to build a company, and it is why clients return: a single team stays accountable from first survey to final handover.

Today more than 650 engineers, builders and craftspeople carry the group's standard across the island — build it once, build it right, build it to outlast us.

image.alt: Modern concrete building rising against the sky

props.heading: A home, from the ground up
props.text: One scroll through a Characom build: the crew arrives, the villa rises, the gardens grow, and a family moves in.
props.caption: Scroll to build

reasons.title: Cypriot and family owned
reasons.text: Three generations of one family, building on the island we call home since 1987.

reasons.title: Deep partner ties
reasons.text: Suppliers, banks and municipalities that have worked with us for decades.

reasons.title: Locally known, locally trusted
reasons.text: Walk any Cypriot town and you will pass a Characom build within minutes.

reasons.title: Here long after handover
reasons.text: Our aftercare teams live in the communities we build.

reasons.title: Best and safest materials only
reasons.text: Every structural element is certified, traceable and tested before it reaches the site.

reasons.title: Delivery on programme, every time
reasons.text: Four decades without a missed government handover date.

reasons.title: One accountable team
reasons.text: Survey, engineering, construction and handover under a single roof.

reasons.title: In-house engineering and QA
reasons.text: Our own engineers check every level before the next one rises.

reasons.title: Government-grade compliance
reasons.text: The same tender-level controls apply to every private home we build.

reasons.title: Transparent costs
reasons.text: Open-book budgets with no hidden extras, ever.

reasons.title: Craftsmen who stay
reasons.text: Site teams that have built with us for decades, not seasons.

reasons.title: Energy-smart designs
reasons.text: Buildings engineered to cut running costs from day one.

reasons.title: Local supply chains
reasons.text: Cypriot materials and partners mean faster lead times.

reasons.title: A ten-year structural warranty
reasons.text: Standard on everything we hand over.

reasons.title: Care that outlasts handover
reasons.text: Aftercare teams stay on call long after the keys change hands.

milestones.title: Founded in Nicosia
milestones.text: Andreas Characos registers the firm with two crews, one mixer truck and a ledger he still keeps.

milestones.title: First government contract
milestones.text: A district school extension in Larnaca opens the group's public-works record — 85 contracts and counting.

milestones.title: 500th home delivered
milestones.text: The Elaia courtyard scheme marks half a thousand Cypriot families housed by the group.

milestones.title: 1.2 million sq.m
milestones.text: Cumulative developed area passes 1.2 million square metres across all three sectors.

props.heading: Have a project in mind?
props.text: Tell us what you are planning — an engineer replies within two working days.
